author: mthuret
subject: v4.0.0-beta.5
body: # [4.0.0-beta.5](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v4.0.0-beta.4...v4.0.0-beta.5) (2017-05-02) ### Bug Fixes * **connectAutoComplete:** allow usage with hits from a single index (algolia/react-instantsearch#75) ([1521640](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/1521640)), closes [#74](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/74) * **InstantSearch:** update algoliaClient when it change (algolia/react-instantsearch#70) ([6907a61](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/6907a61))
